calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Steele for Aubury Randle, Petitioner/Executor (via Zoom).
Patrick Doyle for Ulysses Paul Lucas, Beneficiary (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to whether the trust was ever funded. Ms. Steele confirmed that the trust was not funded or administered during the period of administration. The court verified that the beneficiaries of the trust are the decedent's three children, Ulysses, Aubury, and Olivette. Ms. Steele noted that the pour-over will leaves the estate to all three children as coo-trustees of the trust.

Mr. Doyle confirmed that his client prefers a direct distribution and has signed documents indicating consent. Ms. Steele confirmed that all beneficiaries have agreed this this arrangement.

The court took the matter under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Quiet Title On The Estate Real Property
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Continued To Jul-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Steele appearing via zoom for Aubrey Randle (petitioner).
Patrick Doyle appearing via zoom for and with Ulysses Paul Lucas (objector).

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 23, 1998 is admitted to probate. Aubrey Randle is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 27, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Continued To Jul-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Anne Stelle appearing via zoom for Aubrey Randle (petitioner).
Patrick Doyle appearing via zoom for Ulysses Paul Lucas (objector).

The Court asked Mrs. Steele if she plans to file a response to the objections. Mrs. Steele stated she filed a supplemental memorandum of points and authority. The Court noted that there is no courtesy copy of it, and that there is no petition for the appointment of Mr. Lucas. Discussion was held regarding Mr. Doyle's belief that he did not need to file a petition because the estate doesn't exceed $166,250.00, the Courts position that when objections are filed, a competing petition is needed, the court's position that proceeding by way of a small estate is an elective/chosen process, the issue of there being a quit claim deed that will need to be addressed, etc., Mr. Doyle stated that he anticipates filing a competing petition. The petition for probate of will and letters testamentary is continued to June 28, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court orders counsel to meet and confer, and to talk about whether they can reach an agreement as to how this estate can be administered.

Judge; Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To May-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
